entries.summary: Implement TASK-078 v6.8 Executable Quality Ledger foundation: add the smallest canonical quality-ledger event schema, writer, audit, and negative fixtures that detect missing runtime evidence or contradicted claims. Stop condition: foundation only; do not auto-compute QIF verdicts and do not claim operator validation. QIF boundary: ledger presence is evidence traceability, not semantic truth.
